diagrams.title: CSP Framework Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the three components of any CSP: Variables, Domains, and Constraints with examples
elements: Solution: Complete assignment satisfying all constraints

diagrams.title: Backtracking Search Tree
diagrams.description: Demonstrates backtracking algorithm exploring assignments for 3 variables with domain {A,B}
elements: Backtrack edges shown when constraint violated
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing search space and backtracking process

diagrams.title: Constraint Graph - Map Coloring
diagrams.description: Graph representation of map coloring with regions as nodes and adjacency as edges
elements: Edges: Binary constraints between adjacent regions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding binary constraints as graph structure

diagrams.title: Arc Consistency (AC-3) Process
diagrams.description: Shows how AC-3 removes inconsistent values from domains
elements: Arc (X,Y) with X domain {1,2,3} and Y domain {1,4}
Check each X value for support in Y
Value 2,3 have no support in Y → removed from X's domain
diagrams.purpose: Understanding constraint propagation via arc consistency
